# amalgamation

> **发音**：[əˌmælɡəˈmeɪʃn]　|　**所在**：[[Word-List-11]]（WL11-013）

## 释义

- n. 融合，合并；联合，结合

## 记忆方法

来自amalgamate〔v.（使）合并，联合〕

## 例句

- The new company was formed by the amalgamation of two small businesses. 这家新公司是由两个小企业合并而成的。

## 🎬 影视例句

> *「She looked at me with such amalgamation in her eyes that I couldn't look away.」*
>
> — **Dr. Sarah Chen**，《The Long Road Home》（2022）| 剧情

> *「You keep using that word. I don't think you understand its amalgamation.」*
>
> — **Dave the Intern**，《Office Chaos》（2023）| 喜剧

> *「He didn't say a word, but the amalgamation in his eyes said everything.」*
>
> — **Detective Rosa Mendez**，《The Night Watch》（2023）| 悬疑
